entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS716) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3630.01E. 2. ADD MWLANS WIRELESS NETWORK INSTALLATION AND PRICING AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3646.01E. 3. ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3676.01. 4. ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS AND PRICING AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3638.01E. 5. ADD ETHERNET ACCESS AND PRICING AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3639.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS720) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE MOD INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING SUBMITTALS: AU3684, AU3681, AU3634, AU3683, AU3654

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS721) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDS CCS ICB PRICING, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3703.01E. 2. ADDS ONE (1) RARITAN SED TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3625.02E. 3. ADDS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS (1000MBPS) AND DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS (1GBPS) AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3655.01E. 4. ADDS SUBMISSION ADDS NINE (9) CISCO SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3705.01E 5. ADDS CCS FEATURE PRICING AND CASE NUMBER TO THE CONTRACT TO ALLOW INVOICING FOR SERVICE CHANGE REQUEST AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3708.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS722) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADD IPS CLIN AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3693.01E. 2. ADDS ONE ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR INSIDE WIRE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3702.01E 3. ADDS TWELVE (12) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AU3713.01E

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS724) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3653.01E. 2. ADDITION OF TWO (2) PRIVATE LINE SERVICE DOMESTIC NETWORK SITE CODES, DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3697.01E. 3. ADDITION OF INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS NUMBER AND PRICING FOR SYNCHRONOUS OPTICAL NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3701.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ONE (1) UPLOGIX SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3711.01E. 5. ADDITION OF CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3720.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
